title: Completion State — Unified arena/persona-QA scoring contract
description: The structural contract for grading one unit of comparison work (a bugfix cell, a persona-QA scenario run, or any future arena job-type) on a single job-agnostic verdict/health/metrics/evidence vocabulary. tools/arena's plugins score from this shape instead of scraping stdout; tools/persona_qa/completion.py builds it from a product-journey review.json; tools/bugfix-bakeoff/external/bench.py writes it from the hidden-oracle grade. additionalProperties stays true so a job-type plugin can carry extra fields (e.g. bugfix's cell_id/axis, persona-qa's checks_* counters) without forking the schema.

schema_version.description: Version of this contract the payload was written against, e.g. "1.0.0". Consumers reject unknown major versions rather than silently misreading a field.

verdict.description: Job-agnostic outcome grade. bugfix: oracle GREEN+suite -> solved, oracle GREEN+suite RED -> partial, oracle RED -> failed, verify-mode arming proof -> armed. persona-qa (19-check review gate): ready -> solved, needs_evidence (with some passing signal) -> partial, all-checks-failed / a blocking scenario -> failed or blocked. `pending` means the grade was never run (e.g. a provider/profile blocker) — it is NOT a failure and must be excluded from solve-rate denominators.

health.description: Separates an INFRASTRUCTURE failure (harness/environment broke; not a model result — `infra:*`, e.g. `infra:harness`, `infra:worker-never-ran`, `infra:stall`) from a genuine MODEL result (`model:result`, defer to `verdict`) or a run that stopped early with no clear cause (`incomplete`). A `blocked`/`failed` verdict with `health: infra:*` must never be scored against a model/candidate.

metrics.description: Free-form numeric telemetry for the cell/run: cost_usd, total_tokens, wall_time_s / wall_s, agent_calls, host, guidance_turns, … Job-type plugins add their own keys; consumers read what they recognize and ignore the rest.

evidence_refs.description: Pointers to durable proof for the verdict — trace files, cassette:// URIs, attached-evidence paths, driver-journal evidence refs. Empty is valid (e.g. a `pending` cell has none yet).

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the grade, safe to print in a rollup.

notes.description: [bugfix] Short free-text note — first line of stdout/stderr on an infra signal, or a quality-decision caveat.

blockers.description: [persona-qa] Named blocking scenarios/gates or missing-proof reasons that produced a `blocked` verdict.

job_type.description: [bugfix/arena] Job-type plugin name that produced this grade (e.g. "bugfix", "persona-qa").

trace_ref.description: [bugfix/arena] Path/URI to the live trace this grade was read from, if any.

run_dir.description: [persona-qa] Path to the run bundle this completion-state was derived from.

deck_path.description: [persona-qa] Path to the run's Slidey deck, if produced.
